findings.description: `DataRecord` is missing from s2 hints, despite being used in every dispatch method signature (doHeader, doData, doTrailer, doEnd). Users asking about DataRecord-related dispatch methods would benefit from s2 being surfaced.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows: `public Result doHeader(DataRecord inputData, ExecutionContext ctx)` and similar for all dispatch methods in FileLayoutValidatorAction.

findings.description: `RecordTypeBinding` is missing from s2 hints. The source explicitly references it for the dispatch method naming convention: "規約についての詳細は `RecordTypeBinding_` を参照すること".
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「精査メソッド名の規約は以下のとおりである。規約についての詳細は `RecordTypeBinding_` を参照すること。」
